info.title: Automagically update NuGet packages in .NET projects.

commands.name: global
commands.description:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
repositories the provided token can access.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help
information.

options.name: --includerepos
options.description:
Only consider
repositories matching
this regex pattern.

options.name: --excluderepos
options.description:
Do not consider
repositories matching
this regex pattern.

options.name: --maxrepo
options.description:
The maximum number of
repositories to
change. Defaults to
10.

options.name: --fork
options.description:
Prefer to make
branches on a fork of
the writer
repository, or on
that repository
itself. Allowed
values are
PreferFork,
PreferSingleRepository,
SingleRepositoryOnly.
Allowed values are:
PreferFork,
PreferSingleRepository,
SingleRepositoryOnly.

options.name: --maxpackageupdates
options.description:
The maximum number of
package updates to
apply on one
repository. Defaults
to 3.

options.name: --maxopenpullrequests
options.description:
The maximum number of
open pull requests
for one repository.
Defaults to 1 if
`--consolidate` is
specified, otherwise
defaults to
`--maxpackageupdates`.

options.name: --consolidate
options.description:
Consolidate updates
into a single pull
request. Defaults to
false.

options.name: --label
options.description:
Label to apply to
GitHub pull requests.
Defaults to
'nukeeper'. Multiple
labels can be
provided by
specifying this
option multiple
times.

options.name: --api
options.description:
Api Base Url. If you
are using an internal
server and not a
public one, you must
set it to the api url
of your server.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
Sets the
collaboration
platform type. By
default this is
inferred from the
Url.
Allowed values are:
GitHub, AzureDevOps,
Bitbucket,
BitbucketLocal,
GitLab, Gitea.

options.name: --deletebranchaftermerge
options.description:
Deletes branch
created by NuKeeper
after merge. Defaults
to true.

options.name: --change
options.description:
Allowed version
change: Patch, Minor,
Major. Defaults to
Major.
Allowed values are:
None, Patch, Minor,
Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description:
Allowed prerelease:
Always, Never,
FromPrerelease.
Defaults to
FromPrerelease.
Allowed values are:
Always, Never,
FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Specifies a NuGet
package source to use
during the operation.
This setting
overrides all of the
sources specified in
the NuGet.config
files. Multiple
sources can be
provided by
specifying this
option multiple
times.

options.name: --age
options.description:
Exclude updates that
do not meet a minimum
age, in order to not
consume packages
immediately after
they are released.

arguments.name: TOKEN
arguments.description:
Personal access token
to authorise access
to server.

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --change
options.description:
Allowed version change: Patch,
Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.
Allowed values are: None, Patch,
Minor, Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description:
Allowed prerelease: Always,
Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults
to FromPrerelease.
Allowed values are: Always,
Never, FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Specifies a NuGet package source
to use during the operation. This
setting overrides all of the
sources specified in the
NuGet.config files. Multiple
sources can be provided by
specifying this option multiple
times.

options.name: --age
options.description:
Exclude updates that do not meet
a minimum age, in order to not
consume packages immediately
after they are released.
Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12
hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two
weeks. The default is 7 days.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Only consider packages matching
this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Do not consider packages matching

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Sets the verbosity level of the
command. Allowed values are
q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal],
d[etailed].
Allowed values are: Quiet, Q,
Minimal, M, Normal, N, Detailed,
D.

options.name: --logdestination
options.description:
Destination for logging.
Allowed values are: Console,
File, Off.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description:
Format for output.
Allowed values are: Off, Text,
Csv, Metrics, LibYears.

options.name: --outputdestination
options.description: Destination for output.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description: File name for output.

options.name: --branchnametemplate
options.description:
Template used for creating the
branch name.

options.name: --gitclipath
options.description:
Path to git to use instead of
lib2gitsharp implementation

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description:
The path to a .sln or project
file, or to a directory
containing a .NET
solution/project. If none is
specified, the current directory
will be used.

commands.name: org
commands.description:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps
project.

commands.name: repo
commands.description:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single
repository.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show help
information.

options.name: --setautomerge
options.description:
Set automatically
auto merge for
created pull request.
Works only for Azure
Devops. Defaults to
false.

options.name: --targetBranch
options.description:
Use another target
branch than the
currently active HEAD
branch of the remote
or local repository

options.name: --checkout-directory
options.description:
If you want NuKeeper
to check out the
repository to an
alternate path, set
it here (by default,
a temporary directory
is used).

options.name: --fork
options.description:

branches on a fork of
the writer
repository, or on
that repository
itself. Allowed
values are
PreferFork,

SingleRepositoryOnly.

commands.name: update
commands.description:
Applies relevant updates to a local project.
Run 'NuKeeper [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --maxpackageupdates
options.description:
Maximum number of package
updates to make. Defaults to 1.

options.name: --change
options.description:
Allowed version change: Patch,
Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.
Allowed values are: None, Patch,
Minor, Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description:
Allowed prerelease: Always,
Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults
to FromPrerelease.
Allowed values are: Always,
Never, FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Specifies a NuGet package source
to use during the operation.
This setting overrides all of
the sources specified in the
NuGet.config files. Multiple
sources can be provided by
specifying this option multiple
times.

options.name: --age
options.description:
Exclude updates that do not meet
a minimum age, in order to not
consume packages immediately
after they are released.
Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12
hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two
weeks. The default is 7 days.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Only consider packages matching
this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Do not consider packages
matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Sets the verbosity level of the
command. Allowed values are
q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal],
d[etailed].
Allowed values are: Quiet, Q,
Minimal, M, Normal, N, Detailed,
D.

options.name: --logdestination
options.description:
Destination for logging.
Allowed values are: Console,
File, Off.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description:
Format for output.
Allowed values are: Off, Text,
Csv, Metrics, LibYears.

options.name: --outputdestination
options.description: Destination for output.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description: File name for output.

options.description:
Template used for creating the
branch name.

options.name: --gitclipath
options.description:
Path to git to use instead of
lib2gitsharp implementation
